response.step_by_step_log: Identified two distinct vocal performances separated by a transition in the video. Song 1: 'Show Them (Who You Are)', searched for 'Show Them (Who You Are) Hololive Indonesia lyrics'. Song 2: 'All for One', searched for 'All for One Hololive Production lyrics'. Lyrics are included as representative excerpts.
response.global_summary: A two-song medley performed by Hololive virtual idols for the Hololive Countdown Live 2025 event.

scenes.description: Virtual idols performing 'Show Them (Who You Are)' on stage with a Coca-Cola branded set.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Mimpi kan kau raih
Takkan ragu untuk melangkah
Jauh melampaui batas dirimu
...
It's time to show them who you are
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
You'll reach your dream
Without hesitation to take a step
Far beyond your own limits
...
It's time to show them who you are

scenes.description: Virtual idols performing 'All for One' on stage with a Coca-Cola branded set.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Just look around and see, it's so incredible
So many smiles in a sea of light
Take one step with me and you'll be dazzled
There's magic in the air tonight
...
All for one, we'll shout the show
It's time to show them who you are
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Just look around and see, it's so incredible
So many smiles in a sea of light
Take one step with me and you'll be dazzled
There's magic in the air tonight
...
All for one, we'll shout the show
It's time to show them who you are
